plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic run because the UI structure of the survey form changed, making the cached selectors for 'Last Name' invalid.
observedIndicators: DETERMINISTIC mode active: automation was using stale cached instructions.
UI Redesign: Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field where the cache expected 'Last Name'.
Tool call 'inputText' failed specifically on a 'Last Name' selector that does not exist in the current UI.
History shows intermittent success, suggesting the form might be toggling between versions or was recently updated.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test.
remediationSteps.details: Trigger a retry with 'clearPageAiCache' set to true. This will force the AI to re-analyze the page and identify the correct fields (e.g., 'Your Name' instead of 'Last Name').

remediationSteps.summary: Verify semantic intent against new UI.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after a cache clear, inspect if the 'overallObjective' in the test script needs more specific instructions regarding the new form fields.

plan.notes: Visual comparison confirms a redesign: the baseline shows a completed survey, while the failure screenshot shows a form with 'Your Name' and 'Contact Email' fields. The cached automation attempted to find a 'Last Name' field (data-testid='input-lastname') which is no longer present on the page. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the new form layout.
